mapper.sql: SELECT i.invoice_id, i.invoice_no, i.order_id, i.contract_id, i.customer_id, i.invoice_type, i.invoice_status, i.invoice_amount, i.tax_rate, i.tax_amount, i.invoice_title, i.tax_no, i.invoice_date, i.invoice_attachment, i.del_flag, i.create_by, i.create_time, i.update_by, i.update_time, i.remark, c.customer_name, o.order_no, ct.contract_no FROM mk_invoice i LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON i.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_order o ON i.order_id = o.order_id LEFT JOIN mk_contract ct ON i.contract_id = ct.contract_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_invoice (invoice_no, order_id, contract_id, customer_id, invoice_type, invoice_status, invoice_amount, tax_rate, tax_amount, invoice_title, tax_no, invoice_date, invoice_attachment, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{invoiceNo}, #{orderId}, #{contractId}, #{customerId}, #{invoiceType}, #{invoiceStatus}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{taxRate}, #{taxAmount}, #{invoiceTitle}, #{taxNo}, #{invoiceDate}, #{invoiceAttachment}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_invoice SET del_flag = '2' WHERE invoice_id IN #{invoiceId}
